narrative:
Port Clinton 4A (precinct in Ottawa County) has 862 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.7 percentage points.
